title: ZXSpace Achievements
description: Review known ZXSpace Game Center achievement milestones for repeat play and plan progress around supported play-count goals.
summary: ZXSpace achievements currently reward repeat sessions through known play-count milestones.
heroImageAlt: Placeholder artwork for pending ZXSpace achievements image
sourceNotes: Achievement IDs are derived from current ZXSpace source constants.
Older website metadata listed enemy and wave achievements, but current source constants only verify play-count achievements.

sections.heading: Known achievements
paragraphs: Current ZXSpace source includes Game Center play-count achievement definitions.
Use this page as a practical planning guide until final public Game Center display names are verified.

sections.heading: Planning progress
paragraphs: For repeat-play milestones, focus on clean short sessions and steady learning rather than forcing one long run.
Use each run to improve one habit: cannon positioning, shield preservation, UFO timing, or power-up collection.
